resolutions.matchTitleContains: Micron Will Be More Valuable Than Meta
resolutions.resolutionNotes: Track memory/chip valuations vs Meta market cap — human ratified open fork.

resolutions.matchTitleContains: Power Infrastructure Is The Persistent Bottleneck
resolutions.resolutionNotes: Data-center power constraints widely confirmed 2024–2026; permits still lagging.
Major labs shipping agent harnesses + tool routing; model-only positioning fading.

resolutions.matchTitleContains: The model is no longer the product
resolutions.resolutionNotes: Industry shift to agents/computer-use products validates thesis.
FunCode teaches against this gate mindset (STR-2) — widely observed in enterprise.
